claims.headline: Enhances choline uptake
claims.notesSentence: MKC-231 (coluracetam) restored high-affinity choline uptake and improved learning in cholinergically-impaired rats.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Coluracetam HACU and learning study on PubMed

claims.headline: Supports acetylcholine synthesis
claims.notesSentence: A companion study reported MKC-231 promoted acetylcholine synthesis and release in animal models of cholinergic deficit.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Coluracetam acetylcholine synthesis study on PubMed
